Overview

This page is under construction.
Please refrain from editing the page if another user is actively doing so as to avoid edit conflicts.
Assets from this POI are available in UEFN/Creative
Assets from this POI are available in UEFN and Fortnite Creative inside of Prefabs and Galleries.
This article is about the main version of Tilted. For other versions, see Tilted Towers (Disambiguation).
  • OG
  • Reload
  • C4SOG
  • Chapter 3
  • Chapter 1

OG[]

Tilted Towers is a Named Location in Fortnite: OG that returned in Season 2 to the island Athena. Tilted Towers is the biggest city on the island, full of tall buildings.

History

History[]

  • S2
  • S3
  • S4
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8

Update v33.20[]

January 31st 2025

  • Tilted Towers has returned.
  • The Reboot Van is still present.

Update v34.20[]

March 25th 2025

  • Vending Machines was added to Tilted Towers.

Update v35.10[]

May 16th 2025

  • A Camp Site was added to one of the buildings with signs of a UFO that read "Today Tomorrow".

Update v36.00[]

June 7th 2025

  • A small meteor hit Tilted Towers, creating a crater in the center of the city, completely destroying the Chair Building and slightly damaging the Castle Tower.

Update v36.10[]

June 18th 2025

  • The crater has been patched up. A dump truck is clearing the debris and remains of furniture in the destroyed area.
  • The Hop Rock convoy has reached the Sports Center and is heading to the Villain Lair.
    • It accidentally was present in both Tilted Towers and Sports Center for some time.

Update v36.20[]

July 15th 2025

  • Demolition of the old building is almost complete by a demolishing crane.

Update v36.30[]

July 29th 2025

  • A new building is under construction on the patched up crater.

Update v37.00[]

August 26th 2025

  • The truck by the new building changed its position.

Update v37.10[]

August 26th 2025

  • The truck by the new building changed its position once again.

September 3rd 2025

  • The construction of the new building in Tilted Towers resumes.

Update v37.20[]

September 10th 2025

  • The construction of the new building in Tilted Towers resumes.

Update v37.30[]

September 18th 2025

  • The construction of the new building finished.
  • An All Terrain Kart now spawns inside of it.

Update v37.31[]

September 27th 2025

  • Revin the Cube moved through Tilted Towers and partially destroying the newly built sporting goods shop.

Update v37.40[]

October 2nd 2025

  • Demolition crew moved in and started demolishing the remains of the destroyed sporting goods shop.
  • The All Terrain Kart no longer spawns inside of the store.

Update v39.10[]

December 11th 2025

  • Tilted Towers was partially covered in snow due to the arrival of the iceberg.
  • Reconstruction has started on the new building.
  • Christmas decorations were added.

Update v39.11[]

December 25th 2025

  • Tilted Towers was entirely covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2025

  • The snow melted.

Update v39.20[]

January 9th 2026

  • The re-construction of the building is almost complete.
  • Christmas decorations were removed.

Update v39.40[]

February 5th 2026

  • The office building has now been fully constructed.

February 15th 2026

  • All of Tilted Towers was fully covered by snow in the aftermath of the Ice Storm Event.

Update v39.50[]

March 2nd 2026

  • The snow has started to melt back to it's post-Ice Storm state.

Update v40.00[]

March 19th 2026

  • The snow covering Tilted Towers has melted.

March 30th 2026

  • 3:18pm ET: The News HQ was destroyed by an earthquake.

Update v40.10[]

April 1st 2026

  • Construction of another new building has begun.

Update v40.20[]

April 16th 2026

  • The building in Tilted Towers has almost finished construction.

Update v40.30[]

April 30th 2026

  • No Sweat Insurance has finished construction in Tilted Towers.

Audio

Audio[]

  • Music

Music[]

Location Discovered

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Tilted Towers had an "unlucky spot" which was destroyed 3 times. When Tilted Towers was destroyed during The Unvaulting Live Event, the building on that area, No Sweat Insurance, was, ironically, the only building to survive fully intact.
  • The famous clock tower building is present in at least a main mode for every Chapter of Fortnite.
    • Tilted Towers itself appears fully on Athena and Artemis.
    • Salty Towers included the clock tower on Apollo.
    • A modified Tilted Towers returns in Chapter 4: Season OG.
    • Reload was released during Chapter 5: Season 3, featuring the tower at Tilted Towers on Venture.
    • OG Chapter 1: Season 2 released during Chapter 6: Season 1, with the original Tilted Towers returning and staying throughout the Chapter.
    • The clock tower itself appears on Golden Coast within Sandy Strip.
  • During Season 3, there were many signs of the Meteor hitting Tilted Towers.
  • Tilted Towers was one of the largest POIs on Athena.

Tilted Towers is a Named Location in Fortnite: Reload that was added in Chapter 5: Season 3 with the island Venture. Tilted Towers is the biggest city on the island, full of tall buildings.

History

History[]

  • C5S3

Update v30.20[]

June 22nd 2024

  • Tilted Towers was added.

Audio

Audio[]

  • Music

Music[]

Location Discovered

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • The famous clock tower building is present in at least a main mode for every Chapter of Fortnite.
    • Tilted Towers itself appears fully on Athena and Artemis.
    • Salty Towers included the clock tower on Apollo.
    • A modified Tilted Towers returns in Chapter 4: Season OG.
    • Reload was released during Chapter 5: Season 3, featuring the tower at Tilted Towers on Venture.
    • OG Chapter 1: Season 2 released during Chapter 6: Season 1, with the original Tilted Towers returning and staying throughout the Chapter.
    • The clock tower itself appears on Golden Coast within Sandy Strip.

Tilted Towers was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale that returned in Chapter 4: Season OG with the island Athena. Tilted Towers was the biggest city on the island, full of tall buildings.

History

History[]

  • C4SOG

Update v27.00[]

November 3rd 2023

  • Tilted Towers has returned along with Athena, due to Time Travel.

Update v27.11[]

November 23rd 2023

  • Quadcrashers were vaulted.

November 30th 2023

  • Trail Thrashers can now spawn here.

The Big Bang[]

December 2nd 2023

  • Tilted Towers was sucked into The Black Hole once again.

Audio

Audio[]

  • Music

Music[]

Location Discovered

News Tab

News Tab[]

  • Twitter
  • In-Game

Image Description Date
Wake up.
November 3rd. Where we droppin’?
#FortniteOG 		November 2nd 2023

Image Description Date
Drop At Tilted Towers
Where it all started. Turn back time and drop at Tilted Towers. 		November 3rd 2023

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • The famous clock tower building is present in at least a main mode for every Chapter of Fortnite.
    • Tilted Towers itself appears fully on Athena and Artemis.
    • Salty Towers included the clock tower on Apollo.
    • A modified Tilted Towers returns in Chapter 4: Season OG.
    • Reload was released during Chapter 5: Season 3, featuring the tower at Tilted Towers on Venture.
    • OG Chapter 1: Season 2 released during Chapter 6: Season 1, with the original Tilted Towers returning and staying throughout the Chapter.
    • The clock tower itself appears on Golden Coast within Sandy Strip.
  • Tilted Towers was one of the largest POIs on Athena.
  • Tilted Towers appeared in a total of 12 seasons of Battle Royale.
    • If counting different versions of Tilted Towers, it would be 19 seasons.

  • IO Airship - Tilted (v20.00)

Release

January 18th 2022

Removed

November 15th 2022

Lasted For

301 days
Section

Loot

Chests

55

56

Floor Loot

198

AIs

Henchmen

Character

Section

Ownership

Owner
No Sweat Insurance (v21.00)

The Seven (v20.30)

Franchises

A Lot O' Auto

Big Shots

TACOS

Knepley's Pawn Shop

Chronological Order
Next
Tainted Towers
Tilted Towers was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale that was added in Chapter 3: Season 1 to the island Artemis. Tilted Towers was the biggest city on the island, full of tall buildings.

History

History[]

  • C3S1
  • C3S2
  • C3S3
  • C3S4

Update v19.10[]

January 18th 2022

  • The ice on Frosty Fields has melted, revealing Tilted Towers. The city has been completely redesigned and contains 20 more chests.
  • Tomatohead and Galactico spawn here as Characters.

January 25th 2022

  • The snow left behind after the ice thawed has completely melted.

Update v19.30[]

February 22nd 2022

  • The Coffee Shop west of Tilted Towers begins to experience earthquakes, and eventually caves into the ground due to the drilling by the Imagined Order.

Update v20.00[]

March 20th 2022

  • Tilted Towers falls under the occupation of the Imagined Order, resulting in the entire POI becoming an IO-ruled location, fitted with tents, vehicles, equipment, and more all being set up there. An accessible IO Blimp is also stationed above the location.
  • Galactico no longer spawns here as a Character.

Update v20.30[]

May 3rd 2022

  • Most of Tilted Towers has been destroyed (though not at the same scale as Chapter 1: Season 8). East of the location is a battleground as Seven Sentries begun to battle the IO forces.

May 14th 2022

  • The Seven is victorious and has captured Tilted Towers. The IO Blimp has crashed near Loot Lake. The Seven flags appear at the location.

Update v21.00[]

June 5th 2022

  • Most of Tilted Towers has been rebuilt. The rebuilding will also be done with Fortnite: Creative using The Block 2.0. The Government rebuild buildings.

June 14th 2022

  • Reconstruction of Tilted Towers has continued.

Update v21.10[]

June 21st 2022

  • A new building is being built in Tilted Towers.

Update v21.30[]

July 18th 2022

  • The Underwriter now spawns here as a Character.

July 21st 2022

  • Funding Stations have been put up at Tilted Towers.

July 28th 2022

  • The Restaurant designed in The Block by Benmac is being built in Tilted Towers.

August 3rd 2022

  • The Apartment designed in The Block by Charlee-brown is being built in Tilted Towers.

Update v21.40[]

August 16th 2022

  • The entirety of Tilted Towers has been fully rebuilt.

August 26th 2022

  • All three of The Block 2.0 Buildings were disabled.
    • They were later re-enabled.

Update v22.00[]

September 18th 2022

  • The No Sweat Insurance building is being lifted off the ground.

Update v22.10[]

October 4th 2022

  • No Sweat Insurance has left Tilted Towers.
  • The Underwriter has left with the No Sweat HQ.

Update v22.20[]

October 18th 2022

  • The Flairship has moved to Tilted Towers.
  • Halloween decorations were added.

Update v22.40[]

November 15th 2022

  • The Chrome has reached Tilted Towers, converting it into Tainted Towers.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • The famous clock tower building is present in at least a main mode for every Chapter of Fortnite.
    • Tilted Towers itself appears fully on Athena and Artemis.
    • Salty Towers included the clock tower on Apollo.
    • A modified Tilted Towers returns in Chapter 4: Season OG.
    • Reload was released during Chapter 5: Season 3, featuring the tower at Tilted Towers on Venture.
    • OG Chapter 1: Season 2 released during Chapter 6: Season 1, with the original Tilted Towers returning and staying throughout the Chapter.
    • The clock tower itself appears on Golden Coast within Sandy Strip.
  • In Chapter 3: Season 1 when Tilted Towers came back, 20 more chests were added to it, which means it leads over its rival The Daily Bugle.
  • The first hours of Tilted Towers return in Chapter 3: Season 1 had the location covered in snow and the mini-map showing the previous snow phase but with Tilted Towers labelled.
  • Tilted Towers appeared in a total of 12 seasons of Battle Royale.
    • If counting different versions of Tilted Towers, it would be 19 seasons.

Chapter 1[]

This article is about a location that has been removed from the map.

Section

Tilted Towers

  • Location
  • Top View
Section

Details

Location

SW Loot Lake
NE Shifty Shafts
W Dusty Depot
NW Salty Springs

Type

Named Location

Island

Athena

Release

January 18th 2018

Removed

May 9th 2019

Lasted For

476 days
Section

Loot

Chests

38

Ammo Boxes

42
Chronological Order
Next
Neo Tilted
Tilted Towers was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale that was added in Season 2 to the island Athena. Tilted Towers was the biggest and most popular city on the island, full of tall buildings.

History

History[]

  • S2
  • S3
  • S4
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8
  • S9

Update v2.2.0[]

January 18th 2018

  • Tilted Towers was added.

Update v3.40[]

March 28th 2018

  • Vending Machines were added to Tilted Towers.

Update v3.60[]

April 24th 2018

  • A small campsite appeared on the rooftop. The campsite included handheld signs with a picture of a UFO, and a text that read "Today Tomorrow".

Update v4.00[]

May 1st 2018

  • A small meteor hit Tilted Towers, creating a crater in the center of the city, completely destroying the Chair Building and slightly damaging the Castle Tower.

Update v4.10[]

May 8th 2018

  • Work begins at the center of Tilted Towers to fill up the crater.

Update v4.20[]

May 16th 2018

  • The crater in the area has been patched up. Dump truck are beginning to carry debris and other items from the meteor crash.

Update v4.40[]

June 11th 2018

  • The Hop Rocks convoy from Tilted Towers is now approaching Snobby Shores.
  • Demolition of the old building is almost complete by a demolishing crane.

Update v4.50[]

June 27th 2018

  • A new building is under construction on the patched up crater.

Update v5.30[]

August 23rd 2018

  • The construction of the new building resumes.

Update v5.40[]

September 6th 2018

  • The building that the meteor destroyed is now fully constructed and is now an outdoor store.

Update v5.41[]

September 18th 2018

  • The Cube moved through Tilted Towers and partially destroying the newly built sporting goods shop.

Update v6.00[]

September 27th 2018

  • The remains of the sporting goods shop destroyed by The Cube was surrounded by a wooden fence.

Update v6.10[]

October 16th 2018

  • Demolition crew moved in and started demolishing the remains of the destroyed sporting goods shop.

Update v7.00[]

December 6th 2018

  • Tilted Towers is mostly covered by snow now.
  • Another new building is being built.

Update v7.10[]

December 18th 2018

  • A Christmas Tree was added for the 14 Days of Fortnite event.
  • The construction of the new building resumed.

January 2nd 2019

  • The Christmas Tree was removed as 14 Days of Fortnite ended.

January 8th 2019

  • The Christmas Tree returned as 14 Days of Fortnite was brought back for 7 more days.

Update v7.20[]

January 15th 2019

  • The Christmas Tree was removed as 14 Days of Fortnite ended once again.
  • The construction of the new building is almost complete.

January 22nd 2019

  • The construction is nearly done.

Update v7.30[]

January 29th 2019

  • The new building was finally finished - it is a News HQ building.

Update v7.40[]

February 14th 2019

  • The snow has started to melt in Tilted Towers.

February 27th 2019

  • An earthquake occured in Tilted Towers. The newly built News HQ Building got destroyed.

Update v8.00[]

February 28th 2019

  • Construction of the new building has begun once again.

Update v8.10[]

March 12th 2019

  • The Tilted Towers building has almost finished construction.
  • A large truck at Tilted Towers is emptying out furniture, next to the nearly finished building.

Update v8.20[]

March 27th 2019

  • No Sweat Insurance HQ

Update v8.30[]

April 10th 2019

  • A Reboot Van was added to Tilted Towers.

The Unvaulting Event[]

May 4th 2019

  • Tilted Towers got fully destroyed by the Volcano eruption. No Sweat Insurance HQ was the only surviving building.

Update v9.00[]

May 9th 2019

  • Ruins of Tilted Towers got replaced by Neo Tilted.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • During Season 3, there were many signs of the Meteor hitting Tilted Towers.
    • This was the case, however, as Donald Mustard said on a Marvel Podcast, it was changed to Dusty Depot at the last minute to troll the Battle Royale Fanbase due to the memes and rumors around it.
  • Tilted Towers was one of the largest POIs on Athena.
  • Tilted Towers appeared in a total of 12 seasons of Battle Royale.
    • If counting different versions of Tilted Towers, it would be 19 seasons.
